---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Open TinyCut
2. Load video file '...'
3. Click on '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- **OS**: [e.g., macOS 14.2, Windows 11]
- **TinyCut Version**: [e.g., 0.1.0]
- **Video Format**: [e.g., MP4 H.264]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., video file size, codec details).
